---
title: "Soohyun Choi"
---

<style>
.column-1{
  float: left;
  width: 30%;
  text-align: left;
}
.column-2{
  display: inline-block;
  width: 70%;
  text-align: left;
}
</style>

<div class="column-1">
![](Headshot_close.jpg){#id .class width=5cm}
</div>
<div class="column-2">
Welcome to my site!

I am an PhD candidate of <span style="color:IndianRed">Economics in the School of Economics, Political and Policy Sciences</span> at <span style="color:IndianRed">University of Texas at Dallas</span>, and expect to receive PhD in Spring 2023. I am also a Visiting Assistant Instructor of Economics in <span style="color:#2980B9">Economics and Business Administration Department</span> at <span style="color:#2980B9">Austin College</span>. 

I study U.S. income volatility and interstate migration, and the chapter titles are as follows:

  * Trends in Earnings Volatility for U.S. Men: 1979-2017 *(Job Market Paper)
  * Evaluating Estimators of Tax Migration Responses
  * Income Convergence and Regional Labor Markets in the U.S. 

</div>
<br></br>

<style>
  .col2 {
    columns: 2 200px;         /* number of columns and width in pixels*/
    -webkit-columns: 2 200px; /* chrome, safari */
    -moz-columns: 2 200px;    /* firefox */
  }
</style>

<div class="col2">
School of Economic, Political and Policy Sciences\
University of Texas at Dallas\
800 W Campbell Rd \
Richardson, TX 75080\
Email: [Soohyun.Choi@utdallas.edu](mailto:Soohyun.Choi@utdallas.edu)

[![](128px-LinkedIn_logo_initials.png){width=0.83cm}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/soohyun-choi-b27aa6186/)

Economics and Business Administration Department\
Austin College\
900 N Grand Ave\
Sherman, TX 75090\
Email: [schoi@austincollege.edu](mailto:schoi@austincollege.edu) 

</div>
